hero.subtitle: You follow Brawl Stars competitive? Then prove it. Analyze the matches, pick your winners, and climb the leaderboard.

features.predictDesc: Study the competitive scene, analyze the teams, and make your predictions for every match of the championship.
features.scoreDesc: Every correct pick earns points. The higher you climb, the more you prove you know the game.
features.prizesDesc: Top predictors earn community recognition and prove they know the competitive scene.

howItWorks.title: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.step1Desc: Choose the Brawl Stars championship you want to follow
howItWorks.step2Desc: Analyze the matches and pick who you believe will win
howItWorks.step3Desc: Track your predictions in real-time and see your position on the leaderboard
